faqs.question: What types of ants are most common in Bedford Park?
faqs.answer: Bedford Park homes typically experience infestations from pavement ants, odorous house ants, and carpenter ants. Carpenter ants are particularly concerning in the area's older wooden structures and can cause structural damage if left untreated. Our technicians identify the specific species and customize treatment accordingly.

faqs.answer: We offer same-day or next-day service for Bedford Park residents in most cases. Our Bronx-based team can quickly reach your location near Jerome Park, the Botanical Garden area, or anywhere in Bedford Park to assess and begin treating your ant infestation promptly.

faqs.question: What does the $350-$550 price range include?

The final price depends on the severity of infestation, property size, and type of ants involved.

faqs.question: Are your ant treatments safe for families and pets in Bedford Park homes?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We use EPA-approved products and methods that are safe for children and pets when applied correctly. Our technicians take extra precautions in Bedford Park's family-oriented buildings and will provide specific safety instructions tailored to your household's needs.
